case_title: CS ADVISORS, LLC v. CERTAN STATUTORILY DEFINED INTERESTED PARTIES (INS. CODE §10634(G))

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF HEARING ON FIRST AMENDED PETITION FOR APPROVAL OF TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS (TRANSACTION ID # 78420408) FILED BY PETITIONER CS ADVISORS, LLC HEARING SET FOR MAR-02-2026 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER CS ADVISORS, LLC'S FIRST AMENDED PETITION FOR APPROVAL OF TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS: ALL PARTIES, INCLUDING THE PAYEE, TO APPEAR IN DEPARTMENT 302 AT 1:00 PM MARCH 13, 2026. THE COURT IS CONCERNED WITH THE AMOUNT OF THE PROPOSED TRANSACTION. THE PRESENT VALUE OF THE ANNUITY IS REPRESENTED AS $205,599.71. THE PROPOSED TRANSACTION PRICE IS $60,000. THIS APPEARS TO REPRESENT A REDUCTION FROM PRESENT VALUE AMOUNTING TO $145,599,71. JUDGE: JOHN M. TRUE, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMT)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On First Amended Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Mar-13-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER CS ADVISORS, LLC Notice Of Hearing On First Amended Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights.

Appearances (by Zoom):
John Z. Shafai, Esq., Law Office of, (310) 466-4282, for Petitioner.
Gelareh Golriz, Esq., Law Office of, (818) 802-5183, for and with Patrick Noonan, Payee.

The subject matter is discussed. At the conclusion of discussion, the court grants PETITIONER CS ADVISORS, LLC's First Amended Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights. Counsel for Petitioner is to submit a proposed order.

Judge: John M. True (Visiting Judge). Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/JMT)

Notice Of Hearing On First Amended Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Mar-02-2026 Continued To Mar-13-26 At 01:00 P.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER CS ADVISORS, LLC's First Amended Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights:

All parties, including the Payee, to appear in Department 302 at 1:00 pm March 13, 2026. The Court is concerned with the amount of the proposed transaction. The present value of the annuity is represented as $205,599.71. The proposed transaction price is $60,000. This appears to represent a reduction from present value amounting to $145,599,71.

Judge: John M. True, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMT)
